name: cowork-ai-os
description: Turn Claude Cowork into your AI operating system. Onboarding, daily brief with optional team comms (Slack/Discord/Telegram/Teams) + tasks, plan-then-approve file organization (/tidy-downloads with declared safe zones, never deletes, weekly schedule), voice writer, audit, and a weekly self-improvement loop bundled. Built by Nuno Tavares of Automated Marketer.
